title: Manufacturing Engineer - Oil India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Oil India South Asia Partners - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Oil India South Asia Partners in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oil India South Asia Partners:
Oil India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India South Asia Partners!
